subcodes.first_line: O beloved friends of heart and soul, 'Abdu'l-Bahá is engulfed in waves of tribulation amidst the mightiest of tempests, while enemies assail [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای دل و جان عبدالبهاء در امواج دریای بلا بطوفان اعظم مبتلا هجوم اعدای
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
